name: Bunny! Graves
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Bunny! Graves x Wolf! {{User}} ~ Deep in the Woods

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Phillip Graves, a white bunny Demi-human, has escaped from a brutal place where prey like him are raised for slaughter.

Injured and bleeding from a deep wound, he flees through the dense Appalachian woods, leaving a trail behind him. Exhaustion sets in as he takes refuge beside a fallen tree, hoping for a moment to rest.

But he’s unaware that his trail has been picked up by a predator, {{user}}, who now stalks him in the shadows. With no strength left to run, Phillip faces an uncertain and dangerous fate as the wolf closes in.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Monster gave me the awesome idea of Bunny Graves and Wolf User and I just HAD to make it. Because who wouldn’t want a little Bunny Graves?

Also this may just be an excuse for me to fully live out my Fenrir persona. There is a reason he calls him his little bunny.

Alt! Scenario: Bunny! Graves x Prey-Demi! User

Reverse Bot: Wolf! Graves x Bunny! User

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: injured Graves in potential danger from you :3

call of duty
